title: Legends of Steel Weapons
description: A mod that adds 22 crafts and 7 weapons, as well as an ingot of steel
body:
A mod that adds 22 crafts and 7 weapons, as well as an ingot of steel

Some weapons have effects, namely:
When Massive Battle Axe is struck, you are slowed down
When Samurai Katana Ronin strikes, your opponent is slowed and highlighted
If you hold the Discreet Blade in your hand, you will be able to run faster, but you will be affected by hunger
If you hold the Elven Blade in your hand, you will run faster

All weapons look vanilla, so they will fit perfectly into the game. Also, the weapon will fit perfectly into the rpg assembly because it has no dependencies on other mods

All products are shown in the photo

ATTENTION
3 weapons from the seasons of Lololoshka are in fashion
